body:
This PR reorganizes the optimal LAI model documentation and ensures `pmodel.jl` remains unchanged from the main branch.

## Changes Made

### Documentation Reorganization

The optimal LAI model documentation has been moved from `docs/OPTIMAL_LAI_MODEL.md` to the proper location within the documentation structure: `docs/src/standalone/pages/vegetation/canopy_structure/optimal_lai.md`.

The documentation now:
- Appears in the correct section: **Model Equations → Vegetation → Canopy structure → Optimal LAI model**
- Follows the same structure and style as other vegetation model documentation pages
- Correctly references `src/standalone/Vegetation/optimal_lai.jl` as the primary location for the model code
- Notes the P-model integration separately, clarifying the architectural organization

### Code Changes

Reverted `src/standalone/Vegetation/pmodel.jl` to match the main branch exactly. The optimal LAI model code remains in its proper location in `optimal_lai.jl` (added in PR #1498), keeping concerns properly separated.

## Documentation Preview

Once built, the documentation preview will be available at:
https://clima.github.io/ClimaLand.jl/previews/PR1499/

Navigate to **Model Equations → Vegetation → Canopy structure → Optimal LAI model** to view the new page.

## Related

- Follows up on PR #1498 which implemented the optimal LAI model
- Addresses documentation organization feedback

<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT SUFFIX -->



<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

> you made a documentation page - which is great - can you put it in docs/src/standalone/pages/vegetation/canopy_structure/optimal_lai.md ?
> 
> make sure you adjust the page (for example, the code is no longer in pmodel.jl), and also look at other pages in docs/src/standalone/pages/vegetation and make sure the structure of this new doc page is consistent with others.
> 
> in your PR, make sure that src/standalone/Vegetation/pmodel.jl is the same as it is on the main branch. Merging your PR should remove changes to that file.
> 
> make sure to add [skip ci] to your PR. 
> 
> Add a link to the doc preview URL in your PR comment.


</details>

title: Reorganize optimal LAI documentation and revert pmodel.jl to main branch
